HELLKITE-INNER_SPARK.flavor: The spark of life within is still warm.
HELLKITE-INNER_SPARK.title: InnerSpark
HELLKITE-IGNITION_SOUL.title: Ignition Soul
HELLKITE-IGNITION_SOUL.flavor: The furnace within never truly dies.
HELLKITE-VOLCANIC_ROCK.title: Volcanic Rock
HELLKITE-VOLCANIC_ROCK.description: Enemies with [gold]Scorch[/gold] take 25% more Attack damage.
HELLKITE-VOLCANIC_ROCK.flavor: Still warm from the depths it came from.
HELLKITE-OLD_LIGHTER.title: Old Lighter
HELLKITE-OLD_LIGHTER.description: At the start of combat, apply [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Scorch[/gold] to ALL enemies.
HELLKITE-OLD_LIGHTER.flavor: A horse and a hawk are engraved on the side
HELLKITE-DRAGONS_HEART.title: Dragon Heart
HELLKITE-DRAGONS_HEART.description: The first time [gold]Scorch[/gold] triggers each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Charge[/gold].
HELLKITE-MOLTEN_SHEATH.title: Molten Sheath
HELLKITE-MOLTEN_SHEATH.description: The first time you lose [gold]Charge[/gold] each turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].
HELLKITE-MOLTEN_SHEATH.flavor: Forged anew with every spent ember.
HELLKITE-BLAZING_CROWN.title: Blazing Crown
HELLKITE-BLAZING_CROWN.description: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Charge[/gold].
HELLKITE-BLAZING_CROWN.flavor: Heavy is the head that burns.
HELLKITE-CROWN_OF_ASH.title: Crown of Ash
HELLKITE-CROWN_OF_ASH.description: Whenever you enter [gold]Overcharge[/gold], gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Razor Scales[/gold] and [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].
HELLKITE-CROWN_OF_ASH.flavor: A remnant claimed from the ashes of the past.
HELLKITE-OLD_DRAGONS_FANG.title: Old Dragon's Fang
HELLKITE-OLD_DRAGONS_FANG.description: The first time you apply [gold]Scorch[/gold] each turn, apply it twice.
HELLKITE-OLD_DRAGONS_FANG.flavor: A tooth that still remembers how to bite.
